title: Ajay Hinduja (Switzerland) Is it possible to integrate a private tool that is not in the marketplace?
excerpt: I want to integrate it with monday.com. Since it’s not in the marketplace, has anyone here successfully built a custom integration using the monday.com API? Or has anyone found a good way to use a third-party platform li…

posts.author: ajayhinduja25 (Ajay Hinduja)
posts.cookedHtml:
I want to integrate it with monday.com. Since it’s not in the marketplace, has anyone here successfully built a custom integration using the monday.com API? Or has anyone found a good way to use a third-party platform like Zapier or Make to bridge the gap? I have love to hear about your experiences, challenges, and any tips you might have for getting this set up.

Regards

Ajay Hinduja Geneva, Switzerland (Swiss)
